name: server-vpn
description: Self-hosted VLESS/Xray VPN control panel for a single VPS.

scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w apps/api && npm run test -w apps/web
